title: Premise Card
description: Output of Stage 1 (premise interrogation). Captures the researcher's raw input plus the agent's structured interrogation.

sharpest_question.description: The single question the researcher must answer before proceeding. First thing the agent produces.

claim.description: What the research would contribute if it succeeded.

differentia.description: What makes this not-already-done. Specific, not vague.

nearest_template.description: Closest existing work pattern (methodology or prior system).

missing_evidence.description: Things the researcher has not addressed that the design will have to answer.

sharpened_options.description: Between 2 and 5 sharpened versions of the premise the researcher could pursue.
